category_sources: Official KyTea site describes a text analysis toolkit focused on languages needing word or morpheme segmentation.
source_facts.description describes text analysis for Japanese and Chinese.
display_name_sources: Official KyTea site and repository use the KyTea display name.
docs_sources: Official KyTea site includes program documentation, API documentation, and training documentation.
repo_sources: Official KyTea site links bleeding-edge code on GitHub; the neubig/kytea repository describes itself as the Kyoto Text Analysis Toolkit.
tags_sources: Official KyTea site describes segmentation, tagging, Japanese, Chinese, and text analysis functionality.
